positive: A cyberpunk street scene illustration of a rainy Tokyo alleyway at night. Neon signs reflect off the wet pavement. Holographic advertisements and dense steam create depth. High contrast, dramatic lighting, vibrant magenta and cyan glow, cinematic concept art, synthwave aesthetic.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, natural sunlight, pastoral elements, soft focus
